gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating the health metrics and stats for all the amazing apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the repository documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee checking on plants (apps) in a greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or is looking at a screen with charts, representing the automated metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing tiny reading glasses. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse.
